Welcome to Walker Grove! A refreshing take on what subdivision life can look like in Newfoundland. Situated in a valley, backing on the Canadian Trailway, Walker Grove offers its residents a park like setting in the heart of Conception Bay South. The Alexis plan, like all our homes, has an organic look and feel that fits well with our surroundings. Boasting large living space, main floor laundry, open eating area and kitchen the Alexis is both functional and charming. The second floor has three spacious bedrooms and a large main bath. The master has a large walkin closet and an ensuite which includes soaker tub with shower. This particular lot has a very large rear yard with the total depth being approximately 159. Purchase now and take advantage of introductory offers on upgrades such as energy efficient technology and sunrooms. WALKER GROVE  LOVE WHERE YOU LIVE, LIVE WHERE YOU LOVE.

Results.PublicRemarks: Welcome to The Town Of Holyrood where things are happening in leaps and bounds....this Town is coming alive with activity everywhere, from the North Side to the South Side, new home construction is everywhere! The Marine Institute is growing, the Holyrood Marina and our famous Board Walk...where everyone comes for a friendly walk and chat....there's a feeling in this place that " Now is Our Time", and so we meet...35 Ridge Road, a refurbished 1368 sq ft 2 storey 3 bedroom 1 1/2 bath charmer. This classic salt box has so much to offer with a newly renovated kitchen with cabinets last year, hardwood floors, hardwood staircase, cermanic floors, ditigal thermostats, beautiful painting decor, fancy washrooms and yes, a front covered veranda with a very private back deck that creates charm & character everywhere! As well there's a wired garage with it's own panel box to keep all the tools. Come..walk this place..you decide, If This is Where You Want to Be...Don't Delay..Call Today!!

Welcome to Avondale....and so we meet 38 Dock Ridge Road, a 3/4 acre private lot with look-out and a unique 3500 sq ft 4 bedroom 3 bath split entry. This property has the Wow factor everywhere, from the views atop the look-out...to the Heartland propane stove and fridge, Bosh dishwasher with classic country kitchen cabinets to the open concept dining room which flows in the family room with the stoned bordered woodstove ..awesome!! The oversized living room is great for entertaining...the flow continues with elegance as we enter in the master with ensuite which has radiant in-floor heating. there's so much to tell about this property... new roof in 2015, new vinyl windows, doors, fiberglass septic, all pipes, LG front loading washer and dryer, new deep water artesian pump, new siding with green guard..the list goes on. as a bonus..a 1 bedroom fully furnished apartment. And yes custom made hand stitched drapery everywhere ..WOW! Come have a look at this place..and you decide..awesome!!
